creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This garden cafe in Dubai must be on your list! 

@sevenseedsdxb is a cozy dining venue with a lush outdoor seating. The menu is extensive; from all day breakfast to wholesome main dishes!

What we had:
🍕 Truffle Trio: 85 AED
🍝 Penne Rose: 55 AED

Tag your foodie besties!

transcription.text: I wanna take you somewhere, so you know I care But it's so cold and I don't know where I brought you daffodils and a pretty string
